ddls:
CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., Researcher, Park Ranger, Citizen Scientist) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squirrel_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sighting the behavior was observed in */,
  "behavior_type" TEXT /* Type of behavior (e.g., eating, foraging, chasing) */,
  "behavior_description" TEXT /* Description of the behavior */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squirrel_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sighting the characteristic was observed in */,
  "characteristic_type" TEXT /* Type of characteristic (e.g., fur color, tail length, ear shape) */,
  "characteristic_description" TEXT /* Description of the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squirrel_habitat" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sighting the habitat was observed in */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., forest, grassland, urban) */,
  "habitat_description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squirrel_sightings_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sighting */,
  "sighting_date" TEXT /* Date of the sighting */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the researcher who made the sighting */,
  "sighting_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sighting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation entry */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sighting */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of validation */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the researcher who validated the data */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)
column_names: Role of the researcher (e.g., Researcher, Park Ranger, Citizen Scientist)
